sentences.sentence: The world's factory, it turns out, has a sizeable canteen attached, not to mention an office block and shopping mall.
sentences.translation: 事实证明，这座“世界工厂”还附带着规模可观的食堂，更不用说办公楼和购物中心了。

structure.text: not to mention an office block and shopping mall

difficult_points: The world's factory 比喻中国制造业；it turns out 是插入语，表示统计修正揭示的新事实。
attached 是过去分词作宾语补足语，说明工厂之外还附带服务业。
not to mention 用于补充更明显或更多的事物。

sentences.sentence: Last month's official revision of China's gross domestic product revealed an economy worth 16 trillion yuan (�1.9 trillion) in 2004, 17% more than previously thought.
sentences.translation: 上月对中国国内生产总值的官方修订显示，2004年中国经济规模为16万亿元人民币（约1.9万亿美元），比此前估计高17%。

structure.text: Last month's official revision of China's gross domestic product
an economy worth 16 trillion yuan (�1.9 trillion) in 2004

difficult_points: worth... 是形容词短语，后置修饰 an economy，说明经济规模。
17% more than... 是补充比较，than 后省略 the economy was。
源文货币符号被 NUL 控制字符替代，JSON 中以 `\u0000` 保留，翻译按美元数值理解。

expressions.meaning_zh: 对国内生产总值的官方修订

sentences.sentence: Some�265 billion of the increase - 93% of it - was ascribed to the services sector.
sentences.translation: 新增部分中约2650亿美元——占93%——被归入服务业。
difficult_points: 破折号中的 93% of it 同位补充新增经济规模中服务业所占比例。
ascribe A to B 的被动形式表示把新增产值归属于服务业。
源文 Some 与 265 之间的货币符号被 NUL 字符替代，已原样保留。

sentences.sentence: As a result,services' share of the economy has jumped by nine percentage points, to 41%, compared with 46% for manufacturing and 13% for primary industries (mainly agriculture and mining).
sentences.translation: 因此，服务业在经济中的占比跃升9个百分点至41%，相比之下制造业为46%，第一产业（主要是农业和采矿业）为13%。

structure.text: compared with 46% for manufacturing and 13% for primary industries (mainly agriculture and mining)

difficult_points: 源文逗号后缺少空格（`result,services'`），已原样保留。
by nine percentage points 表示变化幅度，to 41% 表示变化后的终点。
compared with... 是过去分词比较状语，括号解释 primary industries。

sentences.sentence: Where has all this extra activity come from?
sentences.translation: 所有这些新增经济活动来自哪里？

structure.text: has all this extra activity come from

difficult_points: 这是现在完成时直接疑问句，助动词 has 前置。
all this extra activity 回指 GDP 修订中新发现的服务业产值。

sentences.sentence: The bulk of it is obvious to any traveller in China.
sentences.translation: 其中大部分对任何到过中国的旅行者来说都显而易见。

structure.text: obvious to any traveller in China

difficult_points: The bulk of it 指新增服务业活动的大部分；it 回指 extra activity。
obvious to 表示某事对某人而言显而易见。

sentences.sentence: As people grow wealthier, they want more restaurants and bars, clothes stores, car dealerships, bookshops, private hospitals, English language classes and beauty salons.
sentences.translation: 随着人们日益富裕，他们需要更多餐厅和酒吧、服装店、汽车经销店、书店、私立医院、英语课程和美容院。

structure.text: more restaurants and bars, clothes stores, car dealerships, bookshops, private hospitals, English language classes and beauty salons

difficult_points: As 从句兼有时间与原因含义，说明收入增长带动服务需求。
grow wealthier 是系表结构，grow 表示逐渐变得。
want 在此更接近“产生需求”，后面列举多类服务。

sentences.sentence: In many of these businesses, however, turnover and profits have not previously been captured by a statistical system geared to measuring factory production.
sentences.translation: 然而，在许多这类企业中，营业额和利润此前并未被一套以衡量工厂产出为导向的统计体系记录下来。
difficult_points: have not been captured 是现在完成时被动，说明过去统计持续遗漏。
geared to... 修饰 statistical system，to 是介词，后接动名词 measuring。
turnover 指营业额，不是人员流动率。

expressions.text: be captured by a statistical system

sentences.sentence: The small, often private, companies that dominate these areas have also often been at pains to escape notice - and therefore taxes.
sentences.translation: 主导这些领域的小型企业往往是私营公司，它们也常费尽心思避开监管，从而逃避税收。

structure.text: have also often been at pains

difficult_points: that 修饰 companies，并在从句中作主语。
be at pains to 表示煞费苦心做某事；escape notice 表示避免被监管或统计发现。
破折号后 and therefore taxes 省略 escape，意为因不被注意而逃税。

sentences.sentence: Li Deshui, commissioner of China's National Bureau of Statistics, confirms that most of the newly unearthed GDP comes from three categories.
sentences.translation: 中国国家统计局局长李德水确认，新发现的GDP大部分来自三个类别。

structure.text: commissioner of China's National Bureau of Statistics
that most of the newly unearthed GDP comes from three categories

difficult_points: commissioner... 是 Li Deshui 的同位语，说明身份。
that 从句作 confirms 的宾语；newly unearthed 比喻此前统计遗漏、现被发现的 GDP。

sentences.sentence: The first is wholesale, retail and catering; the second, transport, storage, post and telecommunications.
sentences.translation: 第一类是批发、零售和餐饮；第二类是运输、仓储、邮政和电信。

structure.text: the second, transport, storage, post and telecommunications

difficult_points: 分号后省略系动词 is，需补为 the second is...。
The first 和 the second 回指三大服务类别中的前两类。

sentences.sentence: While postal and telecoms services are still state-controlled and thus readily measured, more than a million small tracking and removal companies are not.
sentences.translation: 虽然邮政和电信服务仍由国家控制，因而容易统计，但一百多万家小型运输和搬家公司却并非如此。

structure.text: While postal and telecoms services are still state-controlled and thus readily measured
more than a million small tracking and removal companies

difficult_points: While 表示对比，而非单纯时间关系。
主句 are not 省略 state-controlled and readily measured，意思是小公司难以统计。
tracking 可能是源文对 trucking 的误写；结合 removal companies，语义为运输和搬运公司。

sentences.sentence: The third activity is real estate, booming particularly in the coastal cities and increasingly inland too, leading to an influx of private money - not least from overseas speculators.
sentences.translation: 第三类活动是房地产，它在沿海城市尤其繁荣，并日益向内陆扩展，吸引了大量私人资金流入，其中尤以海外投机者的资金为甚。

structure.text: booming particularly in the coastal cities and increasingly inland too
leading to an influx of private money

difficult_points: booming... 修饰 real estate，说明繁荣地点从沿海延伸到内陆。
leading to... 是结果状语；not least 强调海外投机者是重要资金来源。

sentences.sentence: Property development has, in turn, boosted demand for architects, decorators, do-it-yourself stores and other building services.
sentences.translation: 房地产开发继而带动了对建筑师、装修人员、家装商店和其他建筑服务的需求。

structure.text: demand for architects, decorators, do-it-yourself stores and other building services

difficult_points: in turn 插入现在完成时谓语中，表示房地产繁荣进一步带动其他服务。
boost demand for 表示显著增加对多类专业人员和服务的需求。

sentences.sentence: There is more to China's services boom than dishing up stir-fries, shipping boxes and fitting out apartments.
sentences.translation: 中国的服务业繁荣远不只是炒菜上桌、运输货箱和装修公寓。

structure.text: There is more to China's services boom
than dishing up stir-fries, shipping boxes and fitting out apartments

difficult_points: There is more to A than B 表示 A 的内涵远不止 B。
than 后三个并列动名词用具体活动代表餐饮、物流和装修服务。

sentences.sentence: Recent years have seen a surge in media and technology services, including the internet; in financial services such as leasing; and in education and leisure.
sentences.translation: 近年来，媒体与技术服务（包括互联网）、租赁等金融服务，以及教育和休闲服务都出现了激增。

structure.text: a surge in media and technology services, including the internet; in financial services such as leasing; and in education and leisure

difficult_points: Recent years have seen 是拟人化时间表达，意为近年来出现了某种变化。
a surge 后三个由分号分隔的 in 短语并列，分别指三类服务增长。
including 和 such as 分别引出互联网和租赁作为例子。

sentences.sentence: In a small way, for example, China is starting to rival India as an outsourcing hub: less for call-centres that require excellent English than for such tasks as preparing reports and patent filings.
sentences.translation: 例如，中国正以较小规模开始在外包中心地位上与印度竞争；其优势与其说在需要优秀英语能力的呼叫中心，不如说在编写报告和准备专利申请等任务。

structure.text: less for call-centres that require excellent English than for such tasks as preparing reports and patent filings

difficult_points: rival A as B 表示在作为外包中心方面与印度竞争。
冒号后 less for... than for... 表示优势更多在后一类任务。
that 修饰 call-centres；preparing reports and patent filings 是 such tasks 的例子。

expressions.meaning_zh: 在外包中心地位上与……竞争
与其说因为……不如说因为……

sentences.sentence: In October Microsoft took a stake in a Chinese software firm in Dalian, a city in north-east China with a thriving outsourcing industry preparing tax returns and software for companies from Japan and South Korea.
sentences.translation: 10月，微软入股大连一家中国软件公司；大连是中国东北的一座城市，外包业蓬勃发展，为日本和韩国企业编制纳税申报表和开发软件。

structure.text: a stake in a Chinese software firm in Dalian
preparing tax returns and software for companies from Japan and South Korea

difficult_points: take a stake in 表示购入公司股份。
a city... 是 Dalian 的同位语；with 短语说明该城市拥有繁荣外包业。
preparing... 修饰 outsourcing industry，software 前语义上可理解为 producing software。

sentences.sentence: China's rapid economic growth is fuelling demand for accountants, lawyers, bankers and all manner of consultants, as Chinese companies expand and restructure.
sentences.translation: 随着中国企业扩张和重组，中国经济的快速增长正推动对会计师、律师、银行家和各类顾问的需求。

structure.text: demand for accountants, lawyers, bankers and all manner of consultants
as Chinese companies expand and restructure

difficult_points: fuel demand 是比喻表达，表示经济增长推动需求。
as 从句兼有时间与原因含义；expand 和 restructure 是并列谓语。

sentences.sentence: Specialists in marketing, advertising and public relations advise on the relatively new area of marketing products and developing brands.
sentences.translation: 营销、广告和公共关系专家会就产品营销和品牌建设这一相对较新的领域提供建议。

structure.text: Specialists in marketing, advertising and public relations
the relatively new area of marketing products and developing brands

difficult_points: in 后三个领域并列修饰 Specialists。
advise on 表示就某领域提供专业建议；marketing 和 developing 是 of 后并列动名词。

sentences.sentence: The new wealth has other consequences, too.
sentences.translation: 新增财富还带来了其他影响。
difficult_points: The new wealth 指快速增长带来的居民和企业财富。
too 表示除了专业服务需求外，还有其他连锁后果。

sentences.sentence: China now has nearly a million security guards.
sentences.translation: 中国如今有近一百万名保安。
difficult_points: has 在此表示一个国家范围内存在某类从业者。
nearly a million 表示接近但未达到一百万。

sentences.sentence: It can offer its new rich everything from cosmetic surgeons to pet salons.
sentences.translation: 中国能为新富阶层提供从整形外科医生到宠物美容店的一切服务。

structure.text: everything from cosmetic surgeons to pet salons

difficult_points: It 指 China；the new rich 名词化表示新富阶层，源文用 its new rich。
offer sb sth 是双宾语；from... to... 强调服务范围广。

sentences.sentence: Meanwhile, a huge new market is opening up for private education--fuelled by the combination of a poor public system, the preoccupation of middle-class parents with giving their (often) only child the best chances, and demand from business.
sentences.translation: 与此同时，一个巨大的民办教育新市场正在形成，其动力来自公共教育体系不佳、中产阶级父母执着于给通常是独生的孩子最佳机会，以及企业需求这三者的共同作用。

structure.text: fuelled by the combination of a poor public system, the preoccupation of middle-class parents with giving their (often) only child the best chances, and demand from business

difficult_points: open up 在此表示新市场逐渐形成；双连字符后 fuelled... 说明驱动力。
the combination of 后并列三个因素。
preoccupation with 后接动名词 giving；their (often) only child 插入说明很多家庭只有一个孩子。

expressions.text: a market is opening up for
be fuelled by the combination of

sentences.sentence: Chinese families spend more on education than on anything except housing - the market for courses, books and materials more than doubled from 2002 levels, to �90 billion in 2005.
sentences.translation: 中国家庭在教育上的支出仅次于住房——课程、书籍和材料市场比2002年扩大了一倍以上，2005年达到900亿元。

structure.text: the market for courses, books and materials

difficult_points: more on education than on anything except housing 表示教育支出仅低于住房。
破折号后是完整分句，用市场规模证明教育支出增长。
源文 90 billion 前货币符号被 NUL 字符替代，已用 `\u0000` 保留；翻译按人民币语境处理。

sentences.sentence: Richer households have also caused a tourism boom, which is still chiefly domestic, though more mainlanders are venturing overseas as visa restrictions are lifted.
sentences.translation: 更富裕的家庭还带动了旅游热潮，目前仍以国内旅游为主，不过随着签证限制放宽，越来越多大陆居民开始前往海外。

structure.text: though more mainlanders are venturing overseas

difficult_points: which 指 tourism boom，说明旅游热潮仍主要发生在国内。
though 引导让步，补充出境游增长；venture overseas 表示开始大胆走向海外。
as 从句使用被动语态，说明签证限制放宽与出境增长同步并构成原因。

sentences.sentence: The World Travel & Tourism Council predicts that China's annual tourism market will more than triple to �300 billion within a decade.
sentences.translation: 世界旅行与旅游理事会预测，中国年度旅游市场将在十年内增长到三倍以上，达到3000亿元。

structure.text: that China's annual tourism market will more than triple to �300 billion within a decade

difficult_points: that 从句作 predicts 的宾语；will more than triple 表示规模将增长至三倍以上。
to 300 billion 说明终点规模，within a decade 表示在十年期限内。
源文金额前货币符号被 NUL 字符替代，已保留。

sentences.sentence: China's services sector, on this basis, is well-developed and roughly as large as those of Japan and South Korea were at a similar stage of development, notes the HSBC bank.
sentences.translation: 汇丰银行指出，按这一统计基础，中国服务业已经发展良好，其规模大致相当于日本和韩国处在类似发展阶段时的水平。

structure.text: well-developed and roughly as large as those of Japan and South Korea were at a similar stage of development

difficult_points: on this basis 指依据修订后的 GDP 数据；notes the HSBC bank 是句末倒装报道语。
those 代替 the services sectors，避免重复。
as large as... were 构成同级比较，比较的是相似发展阶段而非当前规模。

expressions.text: at a similar stage of development

sentences.sentence: In reality, it is bigger still, since the GDP revision cannot capture activities such as kerbside lending and tax-dodging cash transactions in property or entertainment--all of which Dong Tao, chief Asia economist at CSFB, another bank, reckons add another �220 billion to the economy.
sentences.translation: 实际上，服务业规模还要更大，因为GDP修订无法涵盖路边借贷以及房地产或娱乐业中逃税的现金交易；瑞信第一波士顿的亚洲首席经济学家陶冬估计，这些活动还为经济增加了约2200亿元。

structure.text: since the GDP revision cannot capture activities such as kerbside lending and tax-dodging cash transactions in property or entertainment
all of which Dong Tao, chief Asia economist at CSFB, another bank, reckons add another �220 billion to the economy

difficult_points: it 指 China's services sector；since 从句解释实际规模更大的原因。
all of which 回指未被统计的各种活动；Dong Tao 是 reckons 的主语，后有两层同位说明。
源文金额前货币符号为 NUL 字符，已保留；add... to the economy 表示增加经济产值。

sentences.sentence: Even so, the 41% of GDP claimed by services in China remains below the 60-75% typical in developed countries.
sentences.translation: 即便如此，中国服务业占GDP的41%，仍低于发达国家通常的60%至75%。

structure.text: below the 60-75% typical in developed countries

difficult_points: Even so 表示即使计入遗漏活动，中国服务业占比仍偏低。
claimed by services 修饰 41% of GDP，表示服务业所占份额。
typical in developed countries 后置修饰 60-75%。

sentences.sentence: It is smaller even than India's 52%.
sentences.translation: 这一比例甚至低于印度的52%。
difficult_points: It 回指中国服务业41%的 GDP 占比。
India's 52% 省略 services share of GDP；even 强调差距出人意料。

sentences.sentence: One reason for this is a bias towards manufacturing--"China's 'real-men-make-stuff' attitude,"as Gordon Orr of McKinsey's Shanghai office puts it.
sentences.translation: 造成这一情况的一个原因是对制造业的偏爱——用麦肯锡上海办公室戈登·奥尔的话说，就是中国那种“真男人就该造东西”的态度。

structure.text: as Gordon Orr of McKinsey's Shanghai office puts it

difficult_points: this 指中国服务业占比低；破折号后引语同位解释制造业偏见。
as... puts it 表示“用某人的话说”；源文闭引号与 as 之间缺少空格，已保留。
real-men-make-stuff 是讽刺性的复合表达，概括重制造轻服务的文化态度。

sentences.sentence: This has led to a plethora of ill-thought-through regulations for services, made worse by China's continuing suspicion of private business, which is mostly concentrated in the services sector.
sentences.translation: 这导致服务业出现大量考虑不周的法规，而中国对私营企业持续存在的戒心使情况更加糟糕；私营企业又大多集中在服务业。

structure.text: a plethora of ill-thought-through regulations for services
made worse by China's continuing suspicion of private business
which is mostly concentrated in the services sector

difficult_points: This 回指重制造业的态度；a plethora of 强调法规数量过多。
made worse... 是过去分词补充，说明私营企业不受信任使法规问题加剧。
which 最自然地指 private business，说明其主要集中于服务业。

sentences.sentence: The lack of a national trucking licence, for example, means hauliers must get approval from each province to move goods across the country and unload them on to different trucks at each border--delaying delivery and increasing spoilage and pilfering.
sentences.translation: 例如，缺乏全国统一的货运许可证，意味着运输商跨省运货时必须获得每个省的批准，并在各省边界把货物卸到不同卡车上，从而延误交付，增加损耗和偷窃。

structure.text: The lack of a national trucking licence
hauliers must get approval from each province to move goods across the country and unload them on to different trucks at each border
delaying delivery and increasing spoilage and pilfering

difficult_points: means 后省略 that，引出运输商必须做什么的宾语从句。
to move... 可理解为获得批准的目的；move 和 unload 是并列动作，them 指 goods。
双连字符后两个分词表示重复换车造成的结果。

sentences.sentence: In retailing, local governments often maintain inefficient supply chains, in part to protect local jobs.
sentences.translation: 在零售业，地方政府往往维持低效的供应链，部分原因是为了保护本地就业。

structure.text: in part to protect local jobs

difficult_points: In retailing 限定讨论行业；maintain 表示让低效结构继续存在。
in part 限定目的解释并非唯一原因；to protect... 是目的状语。

sentences.sentence: David Wei, head of B&Q in China, says his 48 do-it-yourself stores on the mainland are served by 1800 suppliers, compared with 600 suppliers in Britain for more than 300 stores.
sentences.translation: 百安居中国区负责人卫哲说，中国大陆48家家装店由1800家供应商供货，而英国300多家门店只有600家供应商。

structure.text: his 48 do-it-yourself stores on the mainland are served by 1800 suppliers
compared with 600 suppliers in Britain for more than 300 stores

difficult_points: head... 是 David Wei 的同位语；says 后省略 that。
are served by 是被动语态，表示门店由大量供应商供货。
compared with... 用英国300多家门店仅600家供应商突出中国供应链低效。

sentences.sentence: Worse, though China took an early decision to invite foreign direct investment into manufacturing, it has been reluctant to open up services.
sentences.translation: 更糟的是，尽管中国很早就决定吸引外国直接投资进入制造业，却一直不愿开放服务业。

structure.text: though China took an early decision to invite foreign direct investment into manufacturing

difficult_points: though 对比制造业早期开放与服务业持续封闭；it 指 China。
take a decision to 表示作出决定；has been reluctant 表示这种不愿意持续至今。

sentences.sentence: Diana Farrell, director of the McKinsey Global Institute, the consultancy's think-tank, argues that allowing more foreign investment in services could bring not just capital and technology but a competitive dynamic.
sentences.translation: 麦肯锡全球研究院——该咨询公司的智库——负责人戴安娜·法雷尔认为，允许更多外国投资进入服务业，不仅能带来资本和技术，还能引入竞争活力。

structure.text: director of the McKinsey Global Institute
that allowing more foreign investment in services could bring not just capital and technology but a competitive dynamic
allowing more foreign investment in services

difficult_points: 两个同位语逐层说明 Diana Farrell 的职位及研究院性质。
that 从句作 argues 的宾语，其中 allowing... 是动名词主语。
not just... but... 连接资本技术与竞争机制两类收益。

sentences.sentence: The presence of Carrefour and Wal-Mart has led to domestic copycats, creating innovation and productivity growth.
sentences.translation: 家乐福和沃尔玛的进入促使国内企业效仿，从而推动了创新和生产率增长。

structure.text: The presence of Carrefour and Wal-Mart

difficult_points: The presence 指外国零售商在中国市场的存在和经营。
domestic copycats 指模仿其模式的本土企业，不一定只是产品仿制。
creating... 是结果状语，说明竞争模仿带来创新和效率提升。
